CRC32 checksum calculation and MT25Q flash memory driver with QSPI operations.


## Files
- **[flash_crc.c](flash_crc.c.md)**: Calculates CRC32 checksum for flash memory data in chunks.
- **[mt25q.c](mt25q.c.md)**: Driver for MT25Q flash memory, including initialization, reset, and read operations using QSPI.
